goal: Close RestoreAssist project-level Definition of Done gaps using forward-planner and local evidence without crossing production or external gates.

win_condition.statement: RestoreAssist project-level DoD coverage is at or above threshold with false-done prevention active.
win_condition.probe: Unite-Hub getProjectDodCoverageStatus restoreassist coveragePercent >= 90 and falseDonePreventionActive true

win_condition.statement: Standalone business-sale posture is locally documented and not conflated with CRM consolidation.
Production/external gates are explicit and never inferred from local readiness.
Business-sale readiness is assessed separately from code task completion.
Media/voice/Synthex integration boundaries are documented without external action.
RestoreAssist-facing API dependencies have route/test/evidence mapping.
Owner and Board approval model exists for RestoreAssist completion claims.
Mission Control coverage visibility is documented and reconciled with engine output.
Safe local validation evidence exists for touched repos.

moves.title: Freeze autonomous boundaries
moves.deliverable: Batch scope/stop-gate statement embedded in all artifacts
required_evidence: Batch scope/stop-gate statement embedded in all artifacts
Inspect artifacts for prohibited actions
moves.stop_gate: Stop before production DB, Supabase/psql, deployment, OP/1Password, secrets, browser automation, Computer Use, email, Stripe/payments, claims/orders, public publishing, or production release.

moves.title: Capture engine baseline
moves.deliverable: Baseline RestoreAssist DoD status captured from Unite-Hub engine
required_evidence: Baseline RestoreAssist DoD status captured from Unite-Hub engine
Engine output shows 30% before closure
moves.stop_gate: Stop before production DB, Supabase/psql, deployment, OP/1Password, secrets, browser automation, Computer Use, email, Stripe/payments, claims/orders, public publishing, or production release.

risks.risk: Local evidence is mistaken for production readiness.
risks.response: Production gate doc and stop gates remain explicit; final report says deployment occurred: no.

risks.risk: Coverage improves via registry wiring but docs are too shallow.
risks.response: Each evidence doc includes owner-visible checks, remaining gates, and verification commands.

risks.risk: RestoreAssist unrelated branch work contaminates batch.
risks.response: Branch isolated from origin/main before writing artifacts.

risks.risk: Validator path unavailable in future runs.
risks.response: Record validator output and fallback to JSON/static validation if missing.
